title: README slim-down: Models + Status line
goal: Replace the long inline ## Models and ## Status line sections with two short blurbs that link to the docs pages (model.md, install-statusline.md), moving the detailed flags and status-line cache/refresh mechanics into docs so the README stops duplicating them.

steps.title: Audit must-keep facts vs. docs
steps.detail: List which README facts are absent from model.md/install-statusline.md — gauge anatomy, the up-version segment, cache/refresh mechanics (5h, detached, per-session), cheaper-model economics note; decide kept-in-README vs. moved-to-docs.

steps.title: Enrich install-statusline.md docs
steps.detail: Add the gauge/segment anatomy, the up-version hint, and cache/refresh mechanics (temp-dir cache, detached background refresh, per-session check + 5h cooldown) to docs/non-interactive/install-statusline.md so nothing is lost.

steps.title: Slim ## Models to a blurb
steps.detail: Replace the section with ~3 lines: one example, the recommended sonnet/opus combo, the cheaper-model economics note, and a link to docs model.md.

steps.title: Slim ## Status line to a blurb
steps.detail: Replace the section with ~3 lines: one gauge example line plus what it shows, the opt-in note, and a link to docs/non-interactive/install-statusline.md.

steps.title: Fix cross-refs, relocate token-cost line, verify
steps.detail: Re-home the orphaned token-cost example, check all docs links resolve, confirm README is meaningfully shorter with no dangling references.

resolvedVerify: README reads well after the slim-down
